title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
